title: MoreChatHistory Reforged
description: Increases the maximum length of chat history. Forge port of MoreChatHistory by JackFred2
body:
This mod increases the maximum length of the chat history, from the vanilla 100 messages to 16384.

This is a port, original mod can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory). Please, do not report Reforged issues to Fabric mod repo
